goal: High-throughput, resumable EEG upload and lifecycle storage for EDF/BDF/SET/FIF/BrainVision/BIDS datasets
principles: Upload raw bytes directly from browser to object storage with pre-signed multipart URLs; never relay large EEG files through the application API.
Keep metadata, event tables, QC summaries, and analysis manifests in PostgreSQL; keep raw and derivative binary payloads in S3-compatible object storage.
Use content-addressed checksums for instant upload, deduplication, integrity verification, and reproducible analysis provenance.
Optimize for interrupted lab networks: resumable chunks, local checkpoints, adaptive concurrency, exponential retry, and server-side multipart completion.
Separate storage tiers: hot raw data for active projects, warm derivatives for recent analyses, cold/archive tier for completed publications.

preflight: Read file header locally to identify format, sampling rate, channels, and approximate recording duration.
Validate event TSV/annotations before uploading all raw bytes.
Estimate billable EEG hours and storage footprint before task submission.

chunking.adaptive_rule: Increase chunk size when network is stable and RTT is low; decrease when retries exceed 2 per minute.

parallelism.adaptive_rule: Target 80-90% link utilization without increasing retry rate or UI latency.

resume: Persist upload session id, completed parts, chunk hashes, and file fingerprint in IndexedDB.
Resume from the last verified chunk after browser close, network loss, or machine sleep.
Support instant upload when whole-file hash already exists in project or organization storage.

api: POST /uploads/initiate creates upload session and pre-signed multipart URLs.
PATCH /uploads/{id}/parts records completed chunks and validates hashes.
POST /uploads/{id}/complete commits object storage multipart upload and writes BIDS asset metadata.
POST /uploads/{id}/abort releases partial storage and upload locks.

state.redis: short-lived upload sessions, locks, progress, retry counters
state.postgresql: dataset metadata, file manifests, BIDS index, billing duration, project ACL
state.object_storage: raw files, derivatives, figures, reports, publication packages

lifecycle.retain_publication_package: until project owner deletes or retention policy expires

performance_targets.api_backend_large_file_bandwidth: near zero because file bytes bypass API server
